title: Device Home Screen - Limited Support After Launch Date When LM Version Is Below Required
scenario: Limited device support pop-up appears when connecting unsupported device to older Poly Studio Mobile app version
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on an Android device.
2. Ensure the installed app version is older than the required version for the newly released device (based on product catalogue LM version info).
3. Connect the newly released device to the app.
4. Observe the Home screen for the connected device.
5. Tap the "i" icon in the top right corner of the device Home screen.
7. Tap outside the pop-up to dismiss it.
expected: A pop-up message is displayed: \"Device support is limited. Update the Poly Lens Mobile app to enable full functionality.\" Tapping outside the pop-up closes it.
